sentences.target: Je paie ce canapé à crédit.

translations.fr: Je paie ce canapé à crédit.
translations.en: I'm paying for this couch on credit.
translations.de: Ich bezahle dieses Sofa in Raten.
translations.zh-Hans: 我用分期付款买这张沙发。
translations.yue: 我用分期付款買呢張梳化。
translations.ru: Я оплачиваю этот диван в рассрочку.
translations.pt: Estou pagando este sofá em parcelas.
translations.he: אני משלם על הספה הזאת בתשלומים.
translations.vi: Tôi đang trả góp chiếc ghế sofa này.
translations.nl: Ik betaal deze bank in termijnen.
translations.uk: Я оплачую цей диван у розстрочку.
translations.hi: मैं इस सोफ़े का भुगतान किश्तों में कर रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Płacę za tę kanapę na raty.
translations.el: Πληρώνω αυτόν τον καναπέ με δόσεις.
translations.nb: Jeg betaler denne sofaen på avbetaling.
translations.id: Saya membayar sofa ini secara cicilan.
translations.sv: Jag betalar den här soffan på avbetalning.
translations.cs: Platím za tuto pohovku na splátky.
translations.da: Jeg betaler for denne sofa på afbetaling.
translations.ja: このソファを分割払いで買っています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular of ‘payer’.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifying ‘canapé’.
Common noun (masculine), direct object of ‘paie’.
Preposition introducing the manner; part of the fixed expression ‘à crédit’.
Noun meaning ‘credit’; with ‘à’ forms ‘à crédit’ (on credit).

sentences.target: Tu as du crédit sur ton téléphone.
sentences.reading: /ty a dy kʁedi syʁ tɔ̃ telefɔn/

translations.fr: Tu as du crédit sur ton téléphone.
translations.ipa: /ty a dy kʁedi syʁ tɔ̃ telefɔn/
translations.en: You have credit on your phone.
translations.de: Du hast Guthaben auf deinem Handy.
translations.zh-Hans: 你的手机还有话费余额。
translations.ru: У тебя на телефоне есть деньги на счёте.
translations.vi: Điện thoại của bạn còn tiền trong tài khoản.
translations.nl: Je hebt tegoed op je telefoon.
translations.uk: У тебе на телефоні є кошти на рахунку.
translations.nb: Du har saldo på telefonen din.
translations.id: Kamu masih punya pulsa di ponselmu.
translations.sv: Du har saldo på din telefon.
translations.da: Du har taletid på din telefon.
translations.ja: あなたの携帯にはまだ残高があります。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative 2nd person singular of ‘avoir’.
Partitive/contracted article (de + le) marking an indefinite quantity.
Noun meaning credit/balance; direct object of ‘as’.
Preposition meaning ‘on’; introduces the prepositional phrase ‘sur ton téléphone’.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, masculine singular agreeing with ‘téléphone’.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘sur’.

sentences.target: On demande un crédit pour la voiture.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ dəmɑ̃d œ̃ kʁedi puʁ la vwatyʁ/

translations.fr: On demande un crédit pour la voiture.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ dəmɑ̃d œ̃ kʁedi puʁ la vwatyʁ/
translations.en: We're applying for a loan for the car.
translations.es: Estamos solicitando un préstamo para el coche.
translations.de: Wir beantragen einen Kredit für das Auto.
translations.it: Stiamo chiedendo un prestito per l’auto.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在申请汽车贷款。
translations.pt: Estamos solicitando um empréstimo para o carro.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang xin vay cho chiếc xe.
translations.nl: We vragen eine lening aan voor de auto.
translations.hi: हम कार के लिए ऋण का आवेदन कर रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Składamy wniosek o kredyt na samochód.
translations.el: Κάνουμε αίτηση για δάνειο για το αυτοκίνητο.
translations.nb: Vi søker om lån til bilen.
translations.id: Kami sedang mengajukan kredit untuk mobil.
translations.sv: Vi ansöker om lån till bilen.
translations.da: Vi ansøger om lån til bilen.
translations.ja: 車のローンを申し込んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/colloquial subject pronoun (‘one’/‘we’), 3rd person singular agreement.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular of ‘demander’.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing ‘crédit’.
Noun meaning a loan/credit; direct object of ‘demande’.
Preposition expressing purpose (‘for’).
Definite article, feminine singular, agreeing with ‘voiture’.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘pour’.

sentences.target: Nous n'avons plus de crédit internet.

translations.fr: Nous n'avons plus de crédit internet.
translations.en: We don't have any internet credit left.
translations.es: Ya no nos queda saldo de internet.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的上网余额用完了。
translations.pt: Não temos mais crédito de internet.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi hết dữ liệu internet rồi.
translations.hi: हमारे पास इंटरनेट का बैलेंस अब नहीं बचा है.
translations.el: Δεν μας έχει μείνει πια υπόλοιπο δεδομένων.
translations.nb: Vi har ikke mer data igjen.
translations.ro: Nu mai avem credit de internet.
translations.ja: データ残量がもうありません。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural.
‘ne’ clitic for negation attached to ‘avons’ (present indicative 1st person plural of ‘avoir’); main verb in a negative construction.
Negative adverb meaning ‘no longer/any more’, completing ‘ne … plus’.
Determiner used with negation to mark zero quantity before a noun.
Noun meaning credit/balance; complement of the determiner ‘de’.
Common noun used as a post-nominal modifier specifying the type of credit (internet/data).

jp: Je paie ce canapé à crédit.
Tu as du crédit sur ton téléphone.
On demande un crédit pour la voiture.
Nous n'avons plus de crédit internet.
fu: /ty a dy kʁedi syʁ tɔ̃ telefɔn/
/ɔ̃ dəmɑ̃d œ̃ kʁedi puʁ la vwatyʁ/
fr: Je paie ce canapé à crédit.
Tu as du crédit sur ton téléphone.
On demande un crédit pour la voiture.
Nous n'avons plus de crédit internet.
ipa: /ty a dy kʁedi syʁ tɔ̃ telefɔn/
/ɔ̃ dəmɑ̃d œ̃ kʁedi puʁ la vwatyʁ/
en: I'm paying for this couch on credit.
You have credit on your phone.
We're applying for a loan for the car.
We don't have any internet credit left.
